concerns.detail: Detailed description of a deceased PhD student including specific health condition, expulsion circumstances, death, and unique personal quote that could de-anonymize the individual
concerns.excerpt: 组里原来一个身患重疾的phd由于得不到很好的指导和一直push,导致最后公开发信怒斥该ap,然后被强行不给毕业除名后不久已去世,之前嘴里常说的就是“ i wish i can do more”

concerns.detail: Removal of specific testimony about advisor's intern practices (10 interns occupying BAIR workstations) while retaining defensive content, suggesting suppression of substantive legitimate observation
concerns.excerpt: 我BAIR phd，我不知道haoran到底有多少intern，但他的intern去年暑假至少有10个人占了BAIR其他phd的工位（同，证实这一点）
